title: CoveredTransactions
description: Specification of Transactions covered by the legal agreement.

inclusionDate.description: Includes any Transaction specified below that is entered into on or after the specified date.

coveredTransactions.description: Covered Transactions when expressed using the ISDA taxonomy.

bespokeCoveredTransactions.description: Covered Transactions when not expressed using the ISDA taxonomy.

additionalObligations.description: The party specific additional obligations applicable to the document.

exposure.description: Specification of amendments to the calculation of Exposure in terms of the Transactions covered.
